evidence.quote: Finding recorded 2026-07-14 while instrumenting the multipass extraction engine (task-437).

observations.why: A dated, specific finding is presented as an actual completed event.

evidence.quote: On a measured dev run, 57% of the wall clock (575 of 1,002 seconds) was time with no LLM call in flight

observations.why: Measured durations anchor attention to a particular completed run and its actual state.

evidence.quote: The three inter-stage gaps were navigate-to-resolve at 336 seconds, resolve-to-position at 109 seconds, and position-to-narrative at 130 seconds.

observations.why: Named stages and exact durations construe actual recorded events concretely.

evidence.quote: The largest contributor identified and reproduced: a self-invalidating graph cache.

observations.why: The cache behavior is presented as an identified and reproduced actual cause.

evidence.quote: The engine's graph service keys its corpus cache on owner, repo, ref, and the .aswritten tree sha.

observations.why: The sentence states the current concrete mechanism of a named service.

evidence.quote: Both the consult prefetch and the navigator's post-agent reads were building the graph against the run's own work branch.

observations.why: Specific reads and a branch are described as an actual prior operation.

evidence.quote: the source-spur step commits the document and its source transaction to that same work branch mid-run, moving the tree sha
the navigator's read missed the warm cache and rebuilt the entire 64,000-quad corpus

observations.why: A specific mid-run commit and its concrete cache rebuild are narrated as actual events.

evidence.quote: Scarlet's ruling: "the base ref is correct."

observations.why: A named person's specific ruling is presented as a settled act and proposition.
The declarative utterance settles a current state concerning a specific artifact.

evidence.quote: The consult and navigate reads now read the base ref the run was cut from
not the run's own freshly-committed work branch

observations.why: The contrast describes the current concrete read behavior after the change.

evidence.quote: The navigator consults the prior perspective; the document under extraction reaches the engine through pass one

observations.why: Named components and a specific document path are described as the current architecture.

evidence.quote: Both reads now share one warm graph and the run's own commit can no longer invalidate it.

observations.why: The current shared cache state and its settled protection are stated concretely.

evidence.quote: The dead time is also coupled to the prompt cache.

observations.why: The sentence states a current relationship at the level of system behavior rather than a single event.

evidence.quote: a slightly slower document would let the cached prefix evaporate between passes and silently revert the cost

observations.why: A hypothetical slower document introduces a possible future failure pattern at an abstract system level.

evidence.quote: Scarlet approved the one-hour cache TTL

observations.why: Approval of a specific configuration is presented as a completed act.

evidence.quote: The remaining inter-stage time is GitHub-IO and n8n-navigator-round-trip bound.

observations.why: The sentence characterizes the current residual latency as a system-level constraint.
